name: Roasted Tomato and Mint Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Over medium-high heat on a comal or black iron skillet, cook the tomatoes until they are blackened all over.
2. While still warm, pulse the tomatoes with the garlic in a food processor until roughly chopped.
3. Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (cilantro, spearmint, lime zest, orange zest, and salt) to the cooled tomato mixture.
5. Mix everything together well.
6. Allow the salsa to sit at least 30 minutes before using to let the flavors meld.
